---
name: Feature request / new chipmoji
about: Suggest a new entry or an improvement
title: "[idea]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## What hardware intent is missing?

Describe the commit intent that existing entries do not capture well (e.g. "marking a
power-domain crossing").

## Proposed entry

- **Emoji:**
- **Shortcode:** `:example:`
- **Category:** RTL / Timing / PPA / Verification / ...
- **Type:** standard gitmoji / chipmoji extension
- **Description:**
- **Example:** `:example: scope: message`

## Why this matters

Explain why this is broadly useful and how it differs from existing entries.

## Compatibility with Gitmoji

Confirm this does not conflict with a standard [Gitmoji](https://gitmoji.dev/) meaning.
